/usr/bin/ar qc liboptimatrix.a CMakeFiles/optimatrix.dir/src/activations.asm.o CMakeFiles/optimatrix.dir/src/conv1d_avx2.asm.o CMakeFiles/optimatrix.dir/src/gemm.asm.o CMakeFiles/optimatrix.dir/src/gemm_avx2.asm.o CMakeFiles/optimatrix.dir/src/gemv.asm.o CMakeFiles/optimatrix.dir/src/gemv_avx2.asm.o CMakeFiles/optimatrix.dir/src/hadamard.asm.o CMakeFiles/optimatrix.dir/src/scan1d.asm.o CMakeFiles/optimatrix.dir/src/scan2d.asm.o CMakeFiles/optimatrix.dir/src/scan1d_backward_m1_shared_bc.asm.o CMakeFiles/optimatrix.dir/src/scan1d_backward_m1_shared_bc_simple.asm.o CMakeFiles/optimatrix.dir/src/scan1d_backward.c.o CMakeFiles/optimatrix.dir/src/scan1d_backward_m.c.o
/usr/bin/ranlib liboptimatrix.a
